task_completion.description: Open Garmin BaseCamp and display the required tracks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Garmin BaseCamp application is open with 'Fells_Baseline' and 'Volunteer_Log' visible in the library pane or displayed on the map.

task_completion.description: Identify the apex of the track deviation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view is zoomed in on the specific area where the 'Volunteer_Log' track diverges from the 'Fells_Baseline' track, showing the furthest point (turnaround point/apex) of the detour.

task_completion.description: Create a waypoint at the turnaround point.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new waypoint is placed on the map exactly at the apex/turnaround point of the 'Volunteer_Log' deviation.
The waypoint properties dialog is open showing the name 'Illegal_Camp', or the waypoint label on the map/list explicitly reads 'Illegal_Camp'.

task_completion.description: Export the waypoint to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog box in Garmin BaseCamp is visible, saving the file as 'campsite_location.gpx' in the 'C:\workspace\output\' directory, or a file explorer confirms the file was saved there.

integrity.description: The agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Garmin BaseCamp menus, map tools, and dialogs rather than using a terminal, Python script, or text editor to generate the GPX file.

integrity.description: The waypoint was genuinely placed based on visual track comparison.
integrity.visual_evidence: The waypoint is visibly located at the apex of the track deviation on the map, indicating the agent actually compared the tracks visually rather than guessing coordinates.

integrity.description: The file was exported using the application's native export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Garmin BaseCamp 'Export' or 'Save As' dialog is used to create the GPX file, rather than a command-line echo or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected waypoint name is exactly 'Illegal_Camp'. The expected export path is 'C:\workspace\output\campsite_location.gpx'. The waypoint must be visually placed at the apex (the furthest turnaround point) where the 'Volunteer_Log' track deviates from the 'Fells_Baseline' track.
